stmt: ∀ {α : Type u} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, g.1 ≤ □g.1
∀ {α : Type u} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ∀ g h : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, g.1 ≡ h.1
∀ {α : Type u} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] [Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α)], ⊠(⊤ : α) ≡ ⊠⊠(⊤ : α)
∀ {α : Type u} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] [Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α)], ∃ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, g.1 ≡ ⊠(⊤ : α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ACR.Consistent α → ¬ (g.1 ≤ (⊥ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ACR.Equivalent (□g.1) (□(⊠(⊤ : α)))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, g.1 ≤ □(⊠(⊤ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] [Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α)], ACR.Consistent α ↔ ¬ ((⊠(⊤ : α)) ≤ (⊥ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ↔ ⊠(⊤ : α) ≡ ⊠⊠(⊤ : α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ∀ g h : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, g.1 ≡ h.1
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ACR.Consistent α ↔ ¬ (g.1 ≤ (⊥ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ACR.Consistent α → ∀ x : α, ⊠(⊥ : α) ≤ x → ¬ (x ≤ (⊥ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ACR.Consistent α → ¬ (□g.1 ≤ (⊥ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], (∃ h : α, h ≤ □h ∧ □h ≤ h) → Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {x y : α}, ACR.Equivalent x y → ACR.Equivalent (□x) (□y)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ∀ g h : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ACR.Equivalent (□g.1) (□h.1)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] [Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α)], ACR.Consistent α ↔ ¬ (□(⊠(⊤ : α)) ≤ (⊥ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {x y : α}, ACR.Equivalent x y → ACR.Equivalent (⊠x) (⊠y)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ¬ ACR.Consistent α ↔ ∀ x : α, x ≤ (⊥ : α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ACR.Consistent α ↔ ¬ ((⊠(⊥ : α)) ≤ (⊥ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ x : α, ACR.Equivalent (⊠⊠x) (⊠(⊤ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ x y : α, ⊠(⊤ : α) ≤ x → ⊠(⊤ : α) ≤ y → ACR.Equivalent (⊠x) (⊠y)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ↔ ACR.Equivalent (⊠(⊤ : α)) (⊠⊠(⊤ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ∀ g h : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ACR.Equivalent g.1 h.1
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α], ACR.Consistent α ↔ ∀ x : α, (⊤ : α) ≤ x → ¬ (x ≤ (⊥ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ∀ x : α, ⊠(⊥ : α) ≤ x → (⊤ : α) ≤ x
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, □(g.1) ≤ □(□(g.1))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], (∀ x : α, □(□x) ≤ □x) → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α)

There exist instances `hA : ACR Int`, `hP : @ACR.Prov Int hA`, `hR : @ACR.Reft Int hA`, and `hAPS : @ACR.APS Int hA hP hR` such that the preorder on `Int` is the usual integer order, `⊤ = 0`, `⊥ = 0`, `□x = x + 1` for every `x : Int`, and `⊠x = 0` for every `x : Int`.

For any instances `hA : ACR Int`, `hP : @ACR.Prov Int hA`, `hR : @ACR.Reft Int hA`, and `hAPS : @ACR.APS Int hA hP hR`, if the preorder on `Int` is the usual integer order, `⊤ = 0`, `⊥ = 0`, `□x = x + 1` for every `x : Int`, and `⊠x = 0` for every `x : Int`, then `¬ Nonempty (@ACR.HenkinFixpoint Int hA hP)`.
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α) ↔ ∃ h : α, ACR.Equivalent h (□h)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ∀ h : ACR.HenkinFixpoint α, ACR.Equivalent (□h.1) (□□h.1)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], (∃ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, □(□g.1) ≤ □g.1) → Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {x y : α}, x ≡ y → (x ≡ □x ↔ y ≡ □y)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ACR.Consistent α ↔ ¬ (□g.1 ≤ (⊥ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] [Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α)], ∀ x : α, ⊠(⊤ : α) ≤ x → (ACR.Consistent α ↔ ¬ (x ≤ (⊥ : α)))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {x y : α}, ACR.Equivalent x y → (ACR.Equivalent x (⊠x) ↔ ACR.Equivalent y (⊠y))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ¬ ACR.Consistent α ↔ ∀ x : α, □x ≤ (⊥ : α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ((⊠(⊥ : α)) ≤ (⊤ : α)) → (ACR.Consistent α ↔ ¬ ((⊠(⊥ : α)) ≤ (⊥ : α)))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], ACR.Equivalent (⊠(⊥ : α)) (⊤ : α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ x y : α, ACR.Equivalent (⊠(⊠x)) (⊠(⊠y))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ x : α, ⊠(⊤ : α) ≤ x → ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ACR.Equivalent (⊠x) g.1
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], (∀ {x y : α}, x ≤ y → y ≤ x → x = y) → ∀ g h : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, g = h
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ↔ ACR.Equivalent (⊠(⊤ : α)) (⊠(⊠(⊤ : α)))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ∀ x : α, ACR.Equivalent x (⊠(⊤ : α)) → ACR.Equivalent x (⊠x)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] {x y : α}, ACR.Equivalent x y → ACR.Equivalent (⊠x) (⊠y)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α] [Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α)], ∀ x : α, (∃ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ACR.Equivalent x g.1) ↔ ACR.Equivalent x (⊠(⊤ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], (∀ {x y : α}, ACR.Equivalent x y → x = y) → ∀ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, g.1 = ⊠(⊤ : α)
∃ (α : Type*) (_ : ACR α) (_ : PartialOrder α) (_ : ACR.Prov α) (_ : ACR.Reft α) (_ : ACR.APS α) (_ : ACR.C5 α), ∃ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, ACR.Equivalent g.1 (⊠(⊤ : α)) ∧ g.1 ≠ ⊠(⊤ : α)
∃ (α : Type*) (_ : ACR α), ACR.Consistent α ∧ ∃ x : α, ¬ ((⊤ : α) ≤ x) ∧ ¬ (x ≤ (⊥ : α))
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], (⊠(⊥ : α) ≤ (⊤ : α)) ↔ ∀ x : α, (⊠(⊥ : α) ≤ x ↔ (⊤ : α) ≤ x)

∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], ∀ x : α, x ≤ ACR.Prov.prov x → ACR.Prov.prov (ACR.Prov.prov x) ≤ ACR.Prov.prov x → ACR.Equivalent (ACR.Prov.prov x) (ACR.Prov.prov (ACR.Prov.prov x))

∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α] [ACR.C5 α], (∀ x : α, ACR.Prov.prov (ACR.Prov.prov x) ≤ ACR.Prov.prov x) → Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) → ACR.Equivalent (ACR.Prov.prov (ACR.Reft.reft (⊤ : α))) (ACR.Prov.prov (ACR.Prov.prov (ACR.Reft.reft (⊤ : α))))

For any instances `hA : ACR Int`, `hP : @ACR.Prov Int hA`, `hR : @ACR.Reft Int hA`, and `hAPS : @ACR.APS Int hA hP hR`, if `(∀ x y : Int, @LE.le Int hA.toLE x y ↔ x ≤ y)`, `@Top.top Int hA.toTop = 0`, `@Bot.bot Int hA.toBot = 0`, `(∀ x : Int, @ACR.Prov.prov Int hA hP x = x + 1)`, and `(∀ x : Int, @ACR.Reft.reft Int hA hR x = 0)`, then `¬ ACR.Consistent Int`.

For any instances `hA : ACR Int`, `hP : @ACR.Prov Int hA`, `hR : @ACR.Reft Int hA`, and `hAPS : @ACR.APS Int hA hP hR`, if `(∀ x y : Int, @LE.le Int hA.toLE x y ↔ x ≤ y)`, `@Top.top Int hA.toTop = 0`, `@Bot.bot Int hA.toBot = 0`, `(∀ x : Int, @ACR.Prov.prov Int hA hP x = x + 1)`, and `(∀ x : Int, @ACR.Reft.reft Int hA hR x = 0)`, then every `g : ACR.GödelFixpoint Int` satisfies `g.1 = 0`.
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α], (∀ x : α, ¬ (□x ≤ x)) → ¬ Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α)

For any instances `hA : ACR Int`, `hP : @ACR.Prov Int hA`, `hR : @ACR.Reft Int hA`, and `hAPS : @ACR.APS Int hA hP hR`, if the preorder on `Int` is the usual integer order, `⊤ = 0`, `⊥ = 0`, `□x = x + 1` for every `x : Int`, and `⊠x = 0` for every `x : Int`, then there does not exist any instance `hC5 : @ACR.C5 Int hA hP hR hAPS`.

For any `hA : ACR Int`, `hP : @ACR.Prov Int hA`, and `hR : @ACR.Reft Int hA`, if the preorder on `Int` induced by `hA` is the usual integer order, `@Top.top Int hA.toTop = 0`, `@Bot.bot Int hA.toBot = 0`, `@ACR.Prov.prov Int hA hP x = x + 1` for every `x : Int`, and `@ACR.Reft.reft Int hA hR x = 0` for every `x : Int`, then there exists `hAPS : @ACR.APS Int hA hP hR`.

For any `hA : ACR Int`, `hP : @ACR.Prov Int hA`, `hR : @ACR.Reft Int hA`, and `hAPS : @ACR.APS Int hA hP hR`, if the preorder on `Int` induced by `hA` is the usual integer order, `@Top.top Int hA.toTop = 0`, `@Bot.bot Int hA.toBot = 0`, `@ACR.Prov.prov Int hA hP x = x + 1` for every `x : Int`, and `@ACR.Reft.reft Int hA hR x = 0` for every `x : Int`, then `¬ Nonempty (@ACR.HenkinFixpoint Int hA hP)`.
∃ (α : Type*) (_ : ACR α) (_ : ACR.Prov α) (_ : ACR.Reft α) (_ : ACR.APS α), Nonempty (ACR.GödelFixpoint α) ∧ ¬ Nonempty (ACR.HenkinFixpoint α)
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], (∃ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, □(□g.1) ≤ □g.1) → ∃ h : ACR.HenkinFixpoint α, ∃ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, h.1 = □g.1
∀ {α : Type*} [ACR α] [ACR.Prov α] [ACR.Reft α] [ACR.APS α], (∃ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, □(□g.1) ≤ □g.1) → ∃ x : α, x ≡ □x ∧ ∃ g : ACR.GödelFixpoint α, x = □g.1
